description: Court record concerning a gift of a house. Location: Fustat. Dated: Elul 1462 Seleucid = August/September 1151 CE, under the authority of the Nagid Shemuʾel b. Ḥananya. Sutūt bt. ʿUlla, the wife of Nisan b. Yosef, gifts this house to her daughter Sitt al-Naẓar, the wife of Manṣūr al-Ṣabbāgh. The house is located in Fustat in the Kammūna(?) neighborhood near the neighborhoods of Ṣanādiqīn (chest makers) and Saysabāniyyīn. Witnesses: Menashshe b. Yiṣḥaq ha-Ḥazzan; Saʿadya b. Mevorakh. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
